params.name: Advance Elixir
params.description: In the mortal world lacking in spiritual energy, an Advance Elixir is enough to trigger a war between cultivators. After all, the vast majority of practitioners are only in the refinement phase. As long as they build a successful foundation, they will elevate to the upper-middle tier. Not only will their lifespan double, but they'll also be able to learn legendary techniques.
params.ss1:
Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail HP +10
Wonder Fungi Eaten: 200/200
